info.name: CampusFlow API Collection
info.description: Comprehensive API collection for CampusFlow Multi-Tenant SaaS College Management system.

request.description: SaaS Admin (Superuser) creates a new college tenant, provisioning a separate database schema, role groups, and the initial College Admin profile.
Retrieve general configuration, SMTP setup, billing rates, and active subscriptions of a college.
Update address, logo, rates or modules for a specific college tenant.
Self-registration for students. Validates that the email domain matches the college's permitted domain.
Admin endpoint to register Faculty, HODs, Management, or support staff.
Enter the 6-digit OTP received via email to activate the user account.
Resends a new registration OTP code to the specified email address.
Authenticate user credentials. Automatically extracts and stores authorization tokens upon success.
Verify if the current token is valid or expired.
Request reset of the auto-bound hardware device ID (requires Admin approval).
Student requests permission to clear and re-register face embeddings.
Blacklist the refresh token to terminate session.
Fetch a list of user registrations (e.g. Faculty, HOD) awaiting admin approval.
Approve or reject a pending staff user account registration.
Get detailed profile information and role assignments of the logged-in user.
List all active student profiles under the current college (Faculty and above only).
List teaching staff profiles.
List Department Head profiles.
List non-teaching support staff profiles.
Retrieve current tenant settings, logo, name, and customized defaults.
List all departments in the college.
Create a new department under the current tenant.
Get detailed attributes and HOD profile assignments of a specific department.
Create a new geolocation verification point (premises entry gate or classroom radius).
Student uploads front, left, and right profile photos to register face embeddings in the database.
Requests an random eye-blink verification challenge script token for student mobile attendance.
Upload challenge confirmation photo frame to match against stored embeddings.
Student marks attendance by entering the random code generated by the lecturer, inside the geofence.
Student views pending/resolved manual attendance request logs.
Lecturer initiates geofence validation to start their class session.
Start the attendance verification window and generate a dynamic code.
Approve or reject a student's manual attendance override request.
Add a classroom hall associated with a default entrance location gate.
Retrieve all registered classrooms in the college.
Schedule a lecture session linking a faculty user, subject code, and classroom.
Faculty generates a random geofenced code for student checkout.
Define custom leave policies (Sick, Earned, Maternity) for staff.
Employee submits a request for leave.
Approve or reject a submitted leave request.
Retrieve salary configuration matrices for college employees.
Generates pay statements for a specific worker.
Define classification labels for exams (Midsem, Practicals, End-Semester).

request.description: Schedule a new test session detailing rules and locations.
Register a fee category grouping.
Trigger generation of billing invoices across a whole department stream.
Log a student payment reference details.
